content: Ay anyone on here good with technical problems with the game? I got a friend I tried to introduce to it and he seems to have gotten stuck on bootup with "It will load to a small square with an x in the center of the screen and it is the only thing you can interact with" this problem

I really dont think is good to just let we mix characters from any faction in the team and just make some minor changes to team conposition buffs.
It would be better to slowly add more faction, slowly, without forgeting the already existing factions, while also introduce some dual faction characters, that have mechanics benefiting two different factions. 
That is because most character have very unique mechanics that work well only in their faction and makes no sense to mix them with different factions.
I know you already made the changes, but consider this. Also adding new faction have to be slow cause that should increase options, not limit or hinder players, new factions should to have unique gimmicks not just similiar to another and just hindering your character selection.
Great game.
Thanks
